creator: jean-francois.dockes@wanadoo.fr
text:
Approved (I sent the PR actually).
Edwin Groothuis writes:
 > Maintainer of deskutils/recoll,
 > 
 > Please note that PR ports/103894 has just been submitted.
 > 
 > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 > and a committer will take care of it.
 > 
 > The full text of the PR can be found at:
 >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103894
 > 
 > -- 
 > Edwin Groothuis
 > edwin@FreeBSD.org
